stemHtml: Two airplanes are conducting the same approach procedure. How will the tip vortices of the first airplane influence the following aircraft?

options.a: At first they become stronger as the first airplane slows down, but they become weaker as the flaps are extended.
options.b: At first they become weaker as the first airplane slows down, but they become stronger as the flaps are extended.
options.c: The tip vortices will remain constant as the aircraft slows down and extends the flaps.
